# UC-15.4.5 · APC PDU SNMP Bank Load Versus Breaker Headroom

## Description

Approaching breaker limits risks nuisance trips during inrush when new gear powers on.

## Value

Prevents cascading outages during maintenance windows.

## Implementation

(1) Map breaker rating per feed. (2) Use actual nameplate not nominal. (3) Pair with change freeze rules.

## SPL

```spl
index=power sourcetype="snmp:apc:pdu" earliest=-1h
| eval bank_a=tonumber(coalesce(rPDULoadStatusLoad, phase_load_a, ""))/10
| eval bank_b=tonumber(coalesce(rPDULoadStatusLoad2, phase_load_b, ""))/10
| eval headroom=32-bank_a
| where headroom < 4 OR bank_b>28
| table pdu_name bank_a bank_b headroom
```

## Visualization

Stacked bar load vs limit.

## References

- [Schneider Electric — APC product support](https://www.se.com/ww/en/product-category/3100-2000-pdu/)
- [Splunk Connect for SNMP](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/apps#/search=connect%20for%20snmp)
